case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK VS. DOLORES B BONIFACIO et al

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF OCT-05-2007 CONTINUED TO JAN-04-2008 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $240.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT BONIFACIO, DOLORES B
SUPPLEMENTAL DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF INTEREST FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JAN-04-2008 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK AS TO DEFENDANT BONIFACIO, DOLORES B DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR OCT-05-2007 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-06-2007 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         SEP-20-2007
DECLARATION REGARDING CCP 1033 (B) (2) NOTICE COSTS, ATTORNEY'S FEES AND INTEREST FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK

DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BONIFACIO, DOLORES B $561.61 PRINCIPAL, $180.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $450.19 INTEREST, $240.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,431.80, SEE SCANNED DOC
